text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 142 

SPLMTL_BED_TYPE 

LABEL: annual provider Record in Supplemental Bed Type File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is one or more record(s) in the bed type supplemental file for this provider 
(linking from provider base to the provider location and provider bed type files via the 
CCW_APR_LINK_KEY and the PRVDR_LCTN_ID). 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_BED_TYPE 

LONG
